case_title: BAY ADVANCED CHIROPRACTIC VS LAWSTOSKI,JULIAN ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY BAY ADVANCED CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSTOSKI,JULIAN   ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSTOSKI,JULIAN   ATTORNEY AT LAW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY ADVANCED CHIROPRACTIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWSTOSKI,JULIAN   ATTORNEY AT LAW $350.80 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $389.80, CK IN THE AMT OF $350.80 DATED 8/15/94 PAYABLE TO DR. BRIAN BALBON FORWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TO REIMBURSE PLFT. IN THE AMOUNT OF $39.00 COSTS.
